title: 'Amnown #0550
definition:
Amnon = "faithful"

 1) oldest son of David, rapist of Tamar, slain by Absalom
 2) a son of Shimon (of Caleb's clan)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Amnon = "faithful"

 1) oldest son of David, rapist of Tamar, slain by Absalom
 2) a son of Shimon (of Caleb's clan)

    NASB:  faithful, two Isr.
